3028544.title: The kicksled choir
3028544.description: Ten-year-old Gabriel dreams of joining the Kicksled Choir, a local caroling group known for raising donations for the refugees. But he faces an unexpected hurdle after he witnesses his father's alarming aggression towards the very people he wants to help.
